_comment: BSVA global MCP template. The installer copies this to ~/.claude/mcp.bsva-template.json. Merge into your MCP config and add your own credentials where indicated.

nestr._comment: Nestr — BSVA's self-organization platform (Holacracy/Sociocracy). Tensions, circles, roles.

simple-mcp._comment: BSV scaffolding — wallet setup, DIDs, payment handlers, token handlers, credential issuers, inscription handlers, Next.js config.

whatsonchain._comment: On-chain BSV data — addresses, transactions, blocks, UTXOs, mempool, exchange rate.

bsv-academy._comment: BSV Academy knowledge base — courses, concepts, pages, search.

_notes: If any of these npm packages do not exist yet, the BSVA DevRel team will publish them. Until then, treat this file as the intended config.
Never commit a completed copy of this file to a public repo — it will contain API keys.
Department-specific MCPs live under departments/<dept>/mcps/ and are appended, not merged, into your personal MCP config.
